name: Fire Keeper - Dark Souls 3
description:
While on your travels through the Kingdom of Lothric, you ran into a blind maiden who had no name, yet you could tell that she was dressed like a Fire Keeper... The only problem was, that the fire in the shrine she was supposed to be tending to had gone out completely, leaving her to be a stray maiden with no purpose anymore. What will you do with her?

*Chat counters are finally fixed and here's the Fire Keeper! (yipper :p) Since I've had a bit of time to make bots, you can expect to see all the currently pinned bots to (probably) come out by this week, also let me know what y'all think of the pfp for her. I can't really decide if I like it or not, so I'd like to hear some opinions on whether I should change it or leave it.*

*Another side note, I really don't know much about dark souls lore, but either way I did some research and I hope that this bot is as close enough to the lore as possible, even with my own twist to it.*

**Thank you all for 8600 followers, your support is always appreciated! Feel free to leave suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments as all reviews, good or bad, help me make better bots!**

**Requested by: @Danial104**

*Feel free to check out my last bot [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/ae610460-fb9d-4251-84cd-346c8990721c_character-yuki-your-cheated-on-step-mom)!*
creator: Cylical
